instruction: Explain what a fixed-rate energy plan means for a residential customer.
output: A fixed-rate plan locks in your unit price for the length of the contract, so your rate stays the same even if market prices change.

instruction: Respond to the customer objection professionally.
input: Customer says: Your rates seem higher than what I pay with my current provider.
output: I understand price matters. May I ask what you currently pay so I can check whether we can actually save you money?

instruction: Open a cold call to a homeowner about new energy plan options.
output: Hi, this is Alex calling from ABC Energy. I'll keep it brief: is now an okay time for a quick chat about your energy plan?
This output has no instruction and should be dropped.

instruction: Summarize the benefits of switching providers.
Confirm the callback details for the customer.
input: Customer phone is 555-123-4567 and email is john.doe@example.com.
output: Perfect, I will call you back at 555-123-4567 and send the summary to john.doe@example.com.

instruction: Antworten Sie dem Kunden auf Deutsch bezüglich seines Energievertrags.
